response.text:
COUNTER
rationale: r2c1 is 0.15 below your minimum share threshold (0.35); allocate 0.2 kWh instead to preserve cluster stability under simultaneous demand while maintaining your critical SoC buffer.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.20 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.35, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded cluster under stress; all peers requesting simultaneously. Maintain geographic round-robin with minimal per-tick allocation to preserve own SoC above critical threshold while honoring reciprocal trust obligations..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
